query:
ALTER TABLE ideas ADD COLUMN priority ENUM('haute', 'moyenne', 'basse') DEFAULT 'moyenne' NOT NULL AFTER status;
ALTER TABLE ideas ADD COLUMN category VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'fonctionnalite' NOT NULL AFTER priority;
